When I click the logout button, the following error appears:
[browser] ⨯ unhandledRejection: Error: An unexpected response was received froam the server.
 GET /editor 200 in 482ms (next.js: 82ms, proxy.ts: 373ms, application-code: 28ms)

Sometimes, when we log in, we get redirected to this weird long URL, which doesn't show anything on the page:
http://localhost:3000/?__clerk_handshake=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImNhdCI6ImNsX0I3ZDRQRDExMUFBQSIsImtpZCI6Imluc18zQ3lQdk85RXI0S2Y1c0NBTE9KWkNOYkxpSlEiLCJ0eXAiOiJKV1QifQ..oUyiufRx_5y22nFt_sHlwa_GT6CE88Q4lbDVqj3VXbulnV2tdrnTWiUCSih8x564kKjR3NGG9KTJRKHrb19itegVM22s-pBfKIuypJgOzgARBPySKZjLxzCJpLHZ2PXgpn20BsxLQx_p22usFYWBTvb5P-OqrFs6lhxAMyYnlg5zwKp0QkZ5onpyOs3tlZEQfuVLneLsqrRvYIxRGvWI9jjlbP7uw-r-B4IpcIzkRbQ_6EoU0tmqprZVYqgt05FgRwI6fMHnCSw1UFDoF-VyyJTUYvsO7AXNqLaM2SjTfKHCk1ITUmWivXMyh1VBExugtvyNkkchsPrbhX-7fvFRuQ
